Built-in teaching sample

Socratic Math Teacher

Start lessons, ask follow-up questions, and request hints while the app keeps one lesson-centric conversation flow over the hosted backend mount.

Waiting for the host bootstrap payload…
Advanced app details

The platform hosts the backend mount and launch lifecycle, but the app owns the lesson GraphQL schema, generated frontend client, tutor transcript projection, and repeated follow-up semantics.

Application

Start lesson

Create one lesson record and begin the tutoring conversation. Runtime, model, and workspace defaults now come from the host launch setup surface.

The app keeps later student questions on the same lesson record while host launch setup supplies runtime defaults.

Lessons

Track each lesson, its current tutoring status, and the latest activity.

No lessons yet. Start one lesson to begin the tutoring conversation.

Lesson detail

Review the tutoring conversation, current lesson status, and next student action.

Select a lesson to continue the tutoring conversation and review past guidance.

Backend notifications

Optional app notifications fan out through the platform-owned application backend stream.
